docs.title: Refund policy
docs.text: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 to 7 business days after approval. Digital goods are non-refundable once downloaded.

docs.title: Support SLA
docs.text: Priority-one incidents receive a first response within 1 hour, 24/7. Standard tickets are answered within one business day. The support window covers 08:00 to 20:00 UTC on weekdays.

docs.title: Data retention
docs.text: Customer records are retained for 24 months after account closure, then permanently deleted. Backups are encrypted at rest and rotated every 90 days.

docs.title: Onboarding checklist
docs.text: New workspaces start on the Team plan. An admin must verify the company domain before inviting more than 10 members. SSO is available on the Enterprise plan only.
